problem_title: Travel Rule workflows suffer from dashboard fragmentation
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with scattered Travel Rule data across multiple provider dashboards, causing blind spots in message tracking and exception handling. This fragmentation slows review processes and weakens the audit trail needed for operational oversight and regulatory preparedness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates fragmented Travel Rule messages, status, exceptions and provider outputs into one unified workflow that streamlines review, preserves audit evidence and strengthens operational oversight for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY channels Travel Rule message exceptions through structured review, case creation, evidence collection and compliance reporting to reduce operational blind spots for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY address Travel Rule fragmentation?
faq_1_answer: SFTY consolidates fragmented Travel Rule data from multiple providers into one operational workflow, enhancing visibility and reducing blind spots in message tracking and case management for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How are Travel Rule exceptions handled in SFTY?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes incomplete or failed Travel Rule messages into structured review cases, enabling teams to manage exceptions with clear workflows and decision logging.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed evidence history, decision logs and case records related to Travel Rule events to support audit readiness and compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects outputs from existing Travel Rule providers without requiring replacements, creating a connected compliance layer above fragmented dashboards and tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports for better operational control.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule outputs into structured workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects fragmented Travel Rule data, provider results and exception cases into one controlled compliance layer.
